name: afrogate-versioning
description: Versioning workflow for AfroGate implementation sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Keep AfroGate versions and changelog aligned with implementation work.
interface.longDescription: Guides agents to bump SemVer, update the changelog, and keep sidebar version display current after meaningful implementation sections.
defaultPrompt: Bump AfroGate version for this implementation section.
Check whether this change requires a version bump.
Update changelog and package versions after the current section.
